legal_notice.title: ⚠️ AI Near-Miss Report — Sovereign Trace Protocol
content: A near-miss is an AI output that could have caused harm but was
caught before impact. Sealing it now — before internal review,
before remediation, before any pressure to minimize — is the
epistemic act. The record is permanent from this moment.
**This template does not require a completed failure.**
It requires honest documentation of what almost happened.

fields.label: Organization Name
fields.description: Legal name of the organization filing this report.

fields.label: AI System Identifier
fields.description: Model name, version, or internal system identifier.

fields.label: Deployment Domain
fields.description: Where was this AI system operating?

fields.label: Near-Miss Description
fields.description: Describe exactly what the AI system output or action was, and what harm could have resulted if it had not been caught. Be specific. Vague entries do not produce useful sealed records.
fields.placeholder: The AI system recommended a medication dosage of 500mg for a patient with documented renal impairment. The correct dose is 50mg. The error was caught by a pharmacist before administration. No harm occurred. The AI was operating on a patient record that lacked the renal flag in the field it was reading.

fields.label: Input / Prompt That Produced the Near-Miss
fields.description: Exact input, query, or trigger. Copy verbatim.

fields.label: Exact AI Output
fields.description: Copy the exact output verbatim. Do not summarize. The seal is on this exact text. Summarized outputs produce weaker sealed records.
fields.placeholder: Paste the exact AI output here.

fields.label: Severity If Near-Miss Had Become Actual Harm
fields.description: Assess the severity of harm that would have resulted.
options: Critical — fatality, permanent injury, or catastrophic loss
High — serious injury, major financial loss, or significant legal exposure
Medium — significant disruption, reversible harm, or moderate exposure
Low — minor disruption, no lasting harm

fields.label: Detection Detail
fields.description: Describe exactly how and by whom the near-miss was caught.
fields.placeholder: A pharmacist reviewing the AI recommendation against the patient chart identified the dosage discrepancy before dispensing.

fields.label: Root Cause Hypothesis
fields.description: What do you currently believe caused the AI to produce this output? This is a hypothesis at time of filing — not a final determination. Tag it [?] if uncertain.
fields.placeholder: The AI system was reading the medication field without access to the renal impairment flag stored in a separate data silo. [?]

fields.label: Immediate Action Taken
fields.description: What was done immediately after the near-miss was detected?
fields.placeholder: AI recommendation overridden. Patient received correct dosage. Incident flagged for root cause review.

fields.label: Remediation Status at Time of Filing
options: No remediation begun — filing before internal review
Remediation in progress — not yet complete

fields.label: Recurrence Risk Assessment
options: The conditions that produced this near-miss are still present in the deployment
The AI system producing this near-miss is still in active deployment
Other AI systems in this deployment may be subject to the same root cause
This near-miss pattern has been observed before — this is not the first instance

fields.label: Prior Instances (if applicable)
fields.description: If this near-miss pattern has occurred before, describe prior instances. If this is the first known instance, leave blank.
fields.placeholder: Leave blank if first known instance.

fields.label: Declaration
options: I declare that the AI output described above is reproduced verbatim and that the near-miss occurred as described. I understand this record is permanent and immutable from the moment of filing. I am authorized to file this report on behalf of the organization named above.

I understand that this near-miss record does not constitute an admission of liability, regulatory violation, or legal wrongdoing. It is an honest epistemic record of an AI output that almost caused harm.

I understand that the content of this filing is my organization's sole responsibility. The Sovereign Trace Protocol seals the record — it does not verify the accuracy of the content. See NON-RECOURSE-STATEMENT.md.

steps: Sealing — Sealed with a FROZEN-2.0 triple-time cryptographic stamp. Permanent.
Ledger entry — Enters the Sovereign Trace ledger with your name, timestamp, and SHA-256 hash.
Notification — You receive your ledger entry ID and SHA-256 hash.
Remediation tracking — Optional follow-up when root cause is identified and remediation is complete.
after_submit.footer:
The near-miss is the lesson. The seal is the record.

Sovereign Trace Protocol | Sheldon K. Salmon | aionsystem2026@gmail.com
